calendar.description: House Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
Senate Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses the management of wildlife resources and wildlife habitats.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>addresses who may provide verification of illness, injury, or disability in relationship to a license, certificate, or permit issued under the Wildlife Resources Act;<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to notice of acquisition of real property;<hr><ltbullet>addresses rulemaking and penalties related to reporting hunt information;<hr><ltbullet>provides for the management of grizzly bears;<hr><ltbullet>grants rulemaking authority;<hr><ltbullet>addresses discharge of a dangerous weapon related to a waterfowl management area or wildlife management area; <hr><ltbullet>creates the Poaching Mitigation Fund;<hr><ltbullet>provides for restitution money to be deposited into the Poaching Mitigation Fund for use by the Division of Law Enforcement within the Department of Natural Resources;<hr><ltbullet>removes references to spotters;<hr><ltbullet>provides that money in the Guide and Outfitter Fund be used by the Division of Law Enforcement within the Department of Natural Resources;<hr><ltbullet>removes outdated language related to the Division of Professional Licensing;<hr><ltbullet>modifies definitions related to guide and outfitter provisions, including the definition of a guide or outfitter;<hr><ltbullet>modifies fee provisions;<hr><ltbullet>amends under certain circumstances the total number of individuals allowed to provide guide services or outfitting services at a time;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies the relationship between guides and outfitters and the retention of outfitters;<hr><ltbullet>addresses unlawful activity of a pilot of an aircraft;<hr><ltbullet>requires certain reimbursements of investigatory expenses for violations of the wildlife resources title;<hr><ltbullet>modifies provisions related to unlawful taking of protected wildlife related to a guide or outfitter; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming amendments.
